creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 219597
Sugested svn patch

Hello,

I can be maintainer of this port if 249075 doesn't change.

- Added LICENSE file

- Use patches instead of REINPLACE_CMDs, including ( https://github.com/astrand/xclip/commit/db74a39e15f1a75bb1f828103ae7a8d2b4d8ccc3 )

- prepare for an upcoming release!
https://github.com/astrand/xclip/issues/106

Thanks,

Nuno Teixeira
